candidate_llm_application: Treat LLM training-loss oscillations as thermoacoustic standing waves; gradient noise = acoustic pressure, batch update = velocity; engineer phase-coherent training schedule that maintains the Rayleigh criterion to amplify rather than dissipate useful gradient signal.

results.title: LLM Training Dynamics: Gradient Oscillation Analysis
results.snippet: This paper addresses thermoacoustic and Stirling cycle in the context of pressur
